Package trienodes

Class ClassTypeNodeFactory<T extends ACTrieNode>

java.lang.Object
trienodes.ClassTypeNodeFactory<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
AbstractACNodeFactory<T>
public class ClassTypeNodeFactory<T extends ACTrieNode>
extends java.lang.Object
implements AbstractACNodeFactory<T>
A very powerful factory that can create any type of TrieNode which extends ACTrieNode using reflection. One needs to pass in the class of the tree node one wants to create in the constructor and then the factory will generate the node iff, the node constructor is of the form [LanguageParameters, Boolean, Character].
Since:
26.12.2020, Sa.
Author:
Markus Walder

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors 
    Constructor Description
    ClassTypeNodeFactory​(java.lang.Class<T> nodeType)
    The Constructor takes a class which needs to have a constructor of the form [LanguageParameters, Boolean, Character], otherwise it will throw a NoSuchMethodException.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    T createFromDefaultValues​(LanguageParameter parameters, boolean isEndOfWord, java.lang.Character parentChar)
    A simple factory method that takes a set of default parameters and then returns a new Suffix Trie Node of a custom type based on it.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ClassTypeNodeFactory

      public ClassTypeNodeFactory​(java.lang.Class<T> nodeType) throws java.lang.NoSuchMethodException
      The Constructor takes a class which needs to have a constructor of the form [LanguageParameters, Boolean, Character], otherwise it will throw a NoSuchMethodException.
      Parameters:
      nodeType - Class of the NodeType that we want to generate
      Throws:
      java.lang.NoSuchMethodException - whenever the class does not have the right constructor

  • Method Details

    • createFromDefaultValues

      public T createFromDefaultValues​(LanguageParameter parameters, boolean isEndOfWord, java.lang.Character parentChar)
      A simple factory method that takes a set of default parameters and then returns a new Suffix Trie Node of a custom type based on it.
      Specified by:
      createFromDefaultValues in interface AbstractACNodeFactory<T extends ACTrieNode>
      Parameters:
      parameters - The LanguageParameter that defines our underlying Alphabet
      isEndOfWord - Boolean - Indicates whether this Suffix Trie Node represents the end of a word
      parentChar - Character - that tells us the character leading to this node
      Returns:
      Returns a new Trie Node based on the nodeType passed to the constructor
